data.title: "The Best Protein Supplement We've Ever Used" Power Life High Impact Protein Receives 92% Positive Customer Reviews Nationwide
data.description:
"The Best Protein Supplement We've Ever Used" Power Life High Impact Protein Receives 92% Positive Customer Reviews Nationwide

"The Best Protein Supplement We've Ever Used" Power Life High Impact Protein Receives 92% Positive Customer Reviews Nationwide

PR Newswire

LOS ANGELES, April 20, 2026

Power Life High Impact Protein Whey and Plant-Based Blends Feature HMB, Vitamin D3, and Digestive Enzymes to Help Support Lean Muscle, Recovery, and Overall Strength

LOS ANGELES, April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Power Life®, the science-based wellness brand endorsed by fitness icon and lifestyle expert Brooke Burke, has received over 92% positive customer reviews across its High Impact Protein product line, a testament to the brand's mission of delivering high-quality nutrition that supports a strong, resilient body at any age.

Power Life's High Impact Protein is available in both whey-based and plant-based formulas, designed to help preserve lean muscle, support muscle strength and recovery, and promote a healthier body composition. Each blend is uniquely formulated with key ingredients like HMB (a muscle-supporting compound) and vitamin D3. Customers have praised the product for its noticeable impact on strength, endurance, and recovery, even during rest periods.✝

With essential nutrients including calcium and chromium, Power Life's protein powders go beyond typical supplements, offering users an expertly crafted solution for staying strong, confident, and energized.

What is Power Life High Impact Protein?
Power Life High Impact Protein is a premium nutritional supplement designed to support muscle strength, recovery, and healthy body composition, especially as you age. This science-based formula, available in both whey protein and plant-based protein options, features a powerful blend of HMB (beta-hydroxy beta-methylbutyrate), vitamin D3, calcium, chromium, and digestive enzymes to help preserve lean muscle, fuel clean energy, and aid in digestion. Whether you're looking to boost post-workout recovery, stay strong during rest periods, or maintain muscle mass as you age, High Impact Protein provides the essential nutrients your body needs.✝

Power Life's High Impact Protein, both the whey and plant-based formulas, are available in three delicious flavors: Vanilla, Chocolate, and Strawberry Vanilla. Each flavor is carefully crafted for a smooth, satisfying taste without the chalky or gritty texture found in many protein powders. Whether you're blending it into a post-workout shake or adding it to your favorite smoothie, these flavors make it easy (and enjoyable) to get the muscle-supporting nutrients your body needs. Plus, all flavors are free from artificial sweeteners, so you can fuel your body with clean, great-tasting protein every day.

What is the Difference Between Plant Protein and Whey Protein?
The key difference between plant protein and whey protein lies in their source and digestibility.

  • Whey protein is derived from dairy and is a complete protein, meaning it contains all nine essential amino acids. It's highly bioavailable and fast-absorbing, making it ideal for post-workout recovery.
  • Plant-based protein, on the other hand, is derived from high-quality plant sources and is often gentler on the digestive system. Power Life's High Impact Plant Protein includes digestive enzymes to reduce bloating, cramping, and gas, common issues with other protein powders.✝

Both formulas are enriched with HMB, vitamin D3, and other muscle-supporting nutrients, offering clean, powerful support for your strength and vitality goals.

Is Plant Protein or Whey Protein Better for Me?
The best protein for you depends on your dietary preferences, digestive health, and fitness goals.

  • If you tolerate dairy and want fast muscle recovery, High Impact Whey Protein may be your best choice.
  • If you're following a plant-based diet, have a sensitive stomach, or want a cleaner source of energy, High Impact Plant Protein is a fantastic option.

Both formulas support muscle strength, lean muscle preservation, and healthy body composition, thanks to their inclusion of HMB, vitamin D3, and digestive enzymes. With over 92% positive customer reviews, Power Life's protein powders are trusted tools for anyone looking to feel stronger, more confident, and energized, at any age. See the website for more details on customer reviews.

Power Life High Impact Protein Reviews

  • "I am 65 and mix my vanilla "High Impact Plant Protein" in a fruit and oatmeal smoothie every morning when I wake up. I love the way it energizes me, and I don't get hungry till lunch. My day generally starts at 3:00am and I drive a truck for a living. It truly keeps me going for my 12-hour days." - Mike
  • "Best ever. Love all flavors. All of my family uses it and loves it too. I'm nearly 55 years old and have been working out most of my adult life. My wife and daughters are also fit and healthy and workout as part of our healthy lifestyle. This product has been an integral part of it and is by far the best protein supplement we've ever used." - Randy
  • "I've tried many, many protein supplements over the years and this one is hands down the best. Yes it tastes great and has a nice texture. However, more importantly, it helps me feel great! Drinking this every morning (especially when mixed with Foundation Four), helps me feel nourished, energized, and strong throughout the day. My workouts are high-energy and I feel like my recovery is more effective. Can't recommend this highly enough." - Erin

Power Life High Impact Plant Protein Ingredients

  • Plant protein
  • myHMB® and D3
  • Aquamin®
  • ChroMax® (chromium picolinate)

Together, these ingredients:

  • Support lean muscle preservation, especially during periods of rest or reduced activity✝
  • Enhance muscle strength and recovery after workouts or physical activity✝
  • Promote healthy body composition by aiding in the maintenance of muscle mass over fat✝
  • Deliver clean, sustained energy without crashes or artificial stimulants✝*
  • Support strong bones and immune health with a high dose of Vitamin D3 and Calcium✝
  • Improve digestion and nutrient absorption with added digestive enzymes✝
  • Reduce common digestive discomfort like bloating, gas, and cramping✝
  • Help you feel stronger, more energized, and confident at any stage of life✝

Benefits of Vegan Protein Blend in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • Supports lean muscle growth and maintenance with high-quality plant-based protein✝
  • Provides a clean, dairy-free alternative for those with lactose intolerance or plant-based diets
  • Easily digestible and less likely to cause bloating or discomfort compared to some animal proteins
  • Fuels muscles with essential amino acids to promote strength and energy✝
  • Aids in muscle recovery after workouts or daily physical activity✝

Benefits of the HMB and Vitamin D3 in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • HMB helps reduce muscle breakdown, especially during rest periods or calorie restriction✝
  • Supports muscle strength, endurance, and recovery✝
  • Vitamin D3 plays a crucial role in calcium absorption for strong bones and joints✝

Benefits of the Aquamin® in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • Natural marine-sourced multi-mineral complex rich in calcium, magnesium, and trace minerals
  • Supports bone strength and mineral density✝
  • Aids in muscle function and recovery✝
  • Promotes joint comfort and overall skeletal health✝

Benefits of the ChroMax® in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • Helps regulate healthy blood sugar levels✝
  • Supports balanced metabolism and energy production✝
  • May reduce sugar cravings and promote better appetite control✝
  • Aids in maintaining a healthy body composition over time✝

Power Life High Impact Whey Protein Ingredients

  • Whey protein
  • myHMB® and D3
  • DigeZyme®
  • Aquamin®
  • ChroMax® (chromium picolinate)

Together, these ingredients:

  • Promote full-body strength and endurance, even during periods of rest or inactivity✝
  • Aids in faster post-workout recovery and helps reduce muscle soreness✝
  • Encourage lean muscle development while supporting metabolic efficiency✝
  • Provide comprehensive bone and joint support to stay mobile and resilient✝
  • Help the body digest and absorb nutrients more effectively for improved performance✝
  • Support balanced blood sugar levels and steady energy throughout the day✝
  • Help curb unhealthy cravings and support appetite regulation✝

Benefits of the Whey Protein in Power Life High Impact Whey Protein:

  • Delivers a fast-absorbing, complete protein source packed with all nine essential amino acids
  • Helps jumpstart muscle recovery after physical activity or strength training✝
  • Supports muscle protein synthesis to maximize lean muscle gains✝

Benefits of the DigeZyme® in Power Life High Impact Whey Protein:

  • A powerful enzyme blend that helps break down protein, carbs, and fats more efficiently
  • Supports smoother digestion and better nutrient utilization✝
  • Minimizes the chance of bloating, gas, and indigestion often associated with whey protein✝
  • Promotes gut comfort for those with mild sensitivities to dairy
  • Enhances the bioavailability of the protein for optimal muscle nourishment✝

Benefits of the HMB and Vitamin D3 in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • Encourages strength retention and performance even during rest days or aging✝
  • Vitamin D3 plays a critical role in muscle contraction, bone support, and immune function✝
  • Together, they enhance your ability to recover faster and stay active longer✝

Benefits of the Aquamin® in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • A unique multi-mineral complex derived from red marine algae to support skeletal health✝
  • Rich in bioavailable calcium and magnesium for improved bone strength and flexibility✝
  • Supports joint health and reduces exercise-related stiffness✝
  • Helps optimize muscular function through better mineral balance✝

Benefits of the ChroMax® in Power Life High Impact Plant Protein:

  • Provides a highly absorbable form of chromium to support metabolic health
  • Helps the body maintain stable blood sugar levels throughout the day✝
  • May support appetite regulation and reduce sugar cravings✝
  • Plays a role in improving body composition by supporting lean muscle over fat✝

What Makes Power Life High Impact Protein Different From Other Proteins?
Power Life High Impact Protein stands apart from other protein powders due to its meticulously selected, science-backed ingredients and uncompromising quality standards. Every component in the formula has been heavily scrutinized for potency and purity, with third-party laboratory testing. The whey protein is ethically sourced from grass-fed cows in the United Kingdom and undergoes a low-temperature micro- and ultrafiltration process to preserve essential amino acids, supporting muscle restoration, growth, and healthy weight management.

Additionally, the protein is non-GMO, certified for animal health and welfare, and produced with environmental sustainability in mind. The inclusion of digestive enzymes further enhances nutrient absorption and helps reduce common digestive discomfort such as bloating, gas, and cramping, setting Power Life High Impact Protein apart as a clean, effective, and gut-friendly muscle support formula.✝

Is Power Life High Impact Protein Available Anywhere Else Online, or In Stores?
Currently, Power Life High Impact Protein is exclusively available through select direct channels and is not sold in any retail stores or other online platforms. This intentional distribution strategy is designed to prioritize customers who need the product most, ensuring the initial limited supply reaches those individuals directly. By cutting out middlemen and traditional retail markup, Power Life can offer this premium protein formula at the lowest possible price. This approach also allows for closer quality control and a more personalized customer experience as the brand introduces this groundbreaking product to the market.

Power Life High Impact Protein FAQ:

  • Where can I purchase Power Life High Impact Protein?
    • Power Life High Impact Protein is currently available exclusively through the official Power Life website.
      • 1 jar = $69.95
      • 3 jars = $188.85 (Save $75)
      • 6 jars = $353.70 (Save $165)
    • For additional savings, sign up for a Power Life account here.
  • How do I use Power Life High Impact Protein?
    • Power Life High Impact Protein is designed for easy incorporation into daily nutrition routines. Simply mix two scoops with water, milk, or your favorite beverage to enjoy. For optimal results, it is recommended to consume consistently as part of a balanced diet and exercise regimen to support muscle strength, recovery, and healthy body composition.
  • What if Power Life High Impact Protein doesn't work for me?
    • Power Life understands that every individual's body responds differently to supplements. That's why the brand offers a 90-Day Refund Promise, allowing customers to try High Impact Protein risk-free for up to 90 days after purchase. This "test run" period gives users ample time to experience how the formula works for their unique needs, with the assurance of a full refund (minus shipping) if they are not completely satisfied.
  • Does Power Life High Impact Protein contain artificial sweeteners?
    • Instead of sugar or artificial sweeteners, Power Life uses Monk Fruit or Stevia, depending on their products.
  • Does Power Life High Impact Protein contain gluten?
    • No, as of April 2023, Power Life High Impact Protein does not contain gluten.

About Power Life
Founded in 2020, Power Life is dedicated to helping people live their happiest, strongest lives at any age through exceptional, science-backed nutrition. Each product is thoughtfully formulated with clinically studied ingredients to support strength, vitality, and wellness from the inside out. The bestselling lineup includes Foundation Four, High Impact Protein (Whey and Plant-Based), and High Impact Endurance. Renowned longevity expert and founder of Brooke Burke Body, Brooke Burke, serves as Power Life's Wellness Ambassador and Partner. A passionate advocate for healthy aging and holistic wellness, Brooke plays a key role in shaping the brand's mission—empowering people to thrive with strength, energy, and confidence at every stage of life. For more information, visit mypowerlife.com or follow us on Instagram @my_powerlife and TikTok @my_powerlife.

  • All individuals are unique.  Your results may vary. 

✝ These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

Media Contact
press@mypowerlife.com

SOURCE Power Life

data.title: PermRock Royalty Trust Declares Monthly Cash Distribution
data.description:
PermRock Royalty Trust Declares Monthly Cash Distribution

PermRock Royalty Trust Declares Monthly Cash Distribution

PR Newswire

DALLAS, Texas, April 20, 2026

DALLAS, Texas, April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE: PRT) (the "Trust") today declared a monthly cash distribution to record holders of its trust units representing beneficial interests in the Trust ("Trust Units") as of April 30, 2026, and payable on May 14, 2026, in the amount of $5,756.78 ($0.000473 per Trust Unit), based principally upon production during the month of February 2026.

The following table displays underlying oil and natural gas sales volumes and average received wellhead prices attributable to the current and prior month net profits interest calculations:


Underlying Sales Volumes

Average Price


Oil

Natural Gas

$0.79

Oil cash receipts for the properties underlying the Trust totaled $0.82 million for the current month, an increase of $0.13 million from the prior month's distribution period.  T2S Permian Acquisition II LLC ("T2S") informed the Trust that this increase was primarily due to an increase in oil sales volumes and oil prices.

Natural gas cash receipts for the properties underlying the Trust totaled $0.03 million for the current month, essentially unchanged from the prior month's distribution period despite the increase in natural gas sales prices.  T2S informed the Trust that this was primarily due to a decrease in natural gas sales volumes.  

Total direct operating expenses, including marketing, lease operating expenses, and workover expenses, were $0.45 million, an increase of $0.11 million from the prior month's distribution period. T2S informed the Trust that this increase was due to increases in lease operating expenses and workover expenses.

Severance and ad valorem taxes included in this month's net profits calculation were $0.04 million, a decrease of $0.04 million from the prior month's distribution period. T2S informed the Trust that this decrease was primarily due to a decrease in ad valorem taxes.

T2S reported no capital expenditures this month due to completion of all drilling commenced in 2025.

About PermRock Royalty Trust

PermRock Royalty Trust is a Delaware statutory trust formed to own a net profits interest representing the right to receive 80% of the net profits from the sale of oil and natural gas production from certain properties owned and operated by T2S in the Permian Basin of West Texas. For more information on PermRock Royalty Trust, please visit our website at www.permrock.com.

Cautionary Statement Concerning Forward-Looking Statements

Certain statements contained in this press release constitute "forward-looking statements." These forward-looking statements represent the Trust's and T2S's expectations or beliefs concerning future events, and it is possible that the results described in this press release will not be achieved. These forward-looking statements include the amount and date of any anticipated distribution to unitholders, future cash retentions, advancements or recoupments from distributions, and statements regarding T2S's operations and the resulting impact on the computation of the Trust's net profits. The amount of cash received or expected to be received by the Trust (and its ability to pay distributions) has been and will continue to be directly affected by volatility in commodity prices and oversupply. Other important factors that could cause actual results to differ materially from those projected in the forward-looking statements include expenses of the Trust and reserves for anticipated future expenses, uncertainties in estimating the cost of drilling activities and risks associated with drilling and operating oil and natural gas wells.

Any forward-looking statement speaks only as of the date on which it is made, and, except as required by law, the Trust does not undertake any obligation to update or revise any forward-looking statement, whether as a result of new information, future events or otherwise. New factors emerge from time to time, and it is not possible for the Trust to predict all such factors. When considering these forward-looking statements, you should keep in mind the risk factors and other cautionary statements in the Trust's Annual Report on Form 10-K filed with the SEC on March 27, 2026, and other public filings filed with the SEC. The risk factors and other factors noted in the Trust's public filings with the SEC could cause its actual results to differ materially from those contained in any forward-looking statement. The Trust's filed reports are or will be available over the Internet at the SEC's website at http://www.sec.gov.

Contact:         PermRock Royalty Trust

data.title: North American Morning Briefing: Stock Futures Decline on Renewed Iran Uncertainty
data.description:
OPENING CALL

Stock futures pointed to a lower open Monday as investor optimism for a diplomatic end to the war with Iran ceded to renewed uncertainty and rising energy prices.

Before the opening bell the leading indexes were in negative territory.

Over the weekend Iran again closed the critical Strait of Hormuz, President Trump revived threats against Iranian infrastructure, and U.S. forces seized an Iranian-flagged ship accused of attempting to get by their blockade of Iranian ports.

The cease-fire between the U.S. and Iran is set to expire Tuesday evening.

Despite the tensions between the countries, peace talks are expected to take place in Pakistan this week with Vice President JD Vance arriving in the country on Monday evening.

That said, Iran hasn't yet committed to attending the summit.

Though geopolitics are expected to dominate, investor attention will likely also focus on economic data this week.

U.S. retail sales figures for March are due Tuesday. Weak numbers could add to prospects of the Federal Reserve cutting interest rates.

Purchasing managers' surveys for April are due Thursday and will provide an indication of how energy-price increases and uncertainty caused by the Middle East war have impacted manufacturing and services activity.

The University of Michigan's final consumer sentiment survey for April is due on Friday.

Senators, meanwhile, will convene Tuesday and hold a hearing on the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve Chair.

Economic Insight

Central banks are expected to remain cautious and won't be rushing to change policy as escalations continue in the Middle East, according to Invesco, adding that high oil prices have increased inflation concerns.

"Any [rate] cuts will depend heavily on incoming data and energy--driven inflation trends."

Stocks to Watch

AST SpaceMobile shares fell nearly 13% after one of its satellites was placed in an incorrect orbit by Blue Origin.

Eli Lilly shares were marginally 0.7% as investors wait to see if advanced talks to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics result in a deal.

TopBuild shares soared 20% after QXO agreed to acquire the company for $17 billion. QXO shares were down 1.6%.

Watch For:

Canada CPI for March

Today's Top Headlines/Must Reads:

- Small Banks Are Finally Gaining on Their Giant Rivals

- Kevin Warsh Pitched a Case for Fed Rate Cuts. His Future Colleagues Are Skeptical.

- Big Oil Plows Billions Into Far-Flung Drilling Sites to Escape Iran Turmoil

MARKET WRAPS

Forex:

The dollar rose to a near one-week high as oil prices gained on renewed concerns about supply disruptions stemming from the Iran war.

The euro was flat against the dollar, but the currency could strengthen in the longer term as the European Central Bank has more scope to fight higher inflation compared to the Federal Reserve, according to Commerzbank.

Sterling was flat against the dollar, but it could weaken on political concerns as U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer will address lawmakers regarding his appointment of former U.S. ambassador Peter Mandelson.

Bonds:

Treasurys rose, tracking oil prices higher, amid renewed uncertainties about the Strait of Hormuz.

"While markets ended last week with a sizeable risk-on rally, confusion over the status of the Strait of Hormuz has seen some of that optimism unwind as the new week gets underway," Pepperstone said.

Energy:

Oil prices rose more than 5% as shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remained restricted and after the U.S. seized an Iranian-flagged ship.

Natural Gas

European natural-gas prices rose more than 4% as U.S.-Iran tensions dented hopes for a near-term diplomatic resolution in the Middle East.

Metals:

Gold prices fell after news that the Strait of Hormuz was closed again sent oil and gas prices higher, reviving inflation concerns.

Silver futures fell while platinum declined. 

   TODAY'S TOP HEADLINES

UniCredit Pushes For Revamp at Commerzbank

UniCredit is set to outline a plan to transform Commerzbank and extract value from its German peer in the latest move from Chief Executive Andrea Orcel to push through a deal.

The Italian bank, which is Commerzbank's largest shareholder, on Monday published a presentation outlining the details of its "approach to value creation." It described the bank's story as one of operating underperformance, noting that it is overvalued relative to fundamentals and inadequately prepared for future challenges.

Marc Benioff Says the Software Bears Are All Wrong About Salesforce

Marc Benioff has some problems.

His enterprise software company, Salesforce, is the biggest name in a category that Wall Street thinks may get decimated by artificial intelligence.

Deere Settled for $99 Million Over Repair Costs. Farmers Are Still Worried.

Nebraska farmer Guy Mills figures he has spent more than half a million dollars over the past eight years on repairs to his Deere tractors and harvesters.

Mills farms 4,000 acres with five tractors and a harvester. When his harvester broke down in 2023, the repairs cost him $73,000, and the work was done at one of Deere's authorized dealers because he had nowhere else to go.

The CEO Preaching Straight Talk About AI and Job Losses

For a big-company CEO with big AI ambitions, Verizon's Dan Schulman doesn't pull punches about the pain the technology could unleash on America's workforce.

Just months into the job, he has predicted 20% to 30% unemployment within the next two to five years. He warns that advancements in humanoid robots could upend the manual-labor jobs still seen as safe today. And he has pushed for more education and reskilling to help workers adapt to the intensifying tech disruption.

Private Credit Is on the Hunt for Credit-Card Debt

When Wells Fargo told the fintech Bilt that it would no longer be the lender for its rent-rewards credit card, Bilt scrambled to find another large bank partner. When that failed, Bilt wound up with private-credit funding.

In February, Bilt struck a deal to move roughly $1.2 billion of credit-card balances with funding arranged by a group including Blue Owl Capital and Stone Point Capital as well as Goldman Sachs and TD, according to people familiar with the deal.

Stocks Are Back at Records, but Bond Investors Haven't Joined the Party

A disconnect is emerging on Wall Street: Stock investors are already celebrating as though the Iran war never happened, but other markets are telling a more cautious story.

While the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite indexes are both at all-time highs, worries about lasting damage to Middle East energy infrastructure have kept longer-dated oil futures well above their prewar levels. Treasury yields also remain elevated, with investors concerned that higher inflation will make it harder for the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates.

The Record Stock Market Rests on Some Big One-Offs

It's six months, give or take, since AI excitement drove stock valuations above their 2020 bubble high to reach the highest since 2000, the peak of the dot-com bubble.

Something odd has happened since: Valuations, measured as the price-to-earnings or PE ratio, have plunged, while stocks rose to a record high this week.

Tariff refunds are coming: Here's who will get them first

Tariff refunds are getting closer to flowing into bank accounts, with the U.S. government slated to start processing refund claims on Monday.

The refunds have been in the works for about two months, since the Supreme Court knocked down the bulk of President Donald Trump's tariffs in a Feb. 20 ruling.

Germany Is Reinventing Itself as a Weapons Factory

BERLIN-As its export model breaks down, Germany is pivoting from cars to cannons-and trying to turn industrial decline into a defense boom.

After decades as Europe's manufacturing engine, the country is mired in its longest stretch of stagnation since World War II as it wrestles with competition from China and a slump in demand. The response is as stark as the crisis: recasting its industrial base as the West's arsenal.

U.A.E. Asks U.S. About a Wartime Financial Lifeline

WASHINGTON-The United Arab Emirates has opened talks with the U.S. about obtaining a financial backstop in case the Iran war plunges the oil-rich Persian Gulf state into a deeper crisis, U.S. officials said.

U.A.E. Central Bank Gov. Khaled Mohamed Balama raised the idea of a currency-swap line with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Treasury and Federal Reserve officials in meetings in Washington last week, the officials said. The Emiratis emphasized that they had so far avoided the worst economic effects of the conflict but might still need a financial lifeline, the officials said.

Hegseth's Feud With Army Secretary Spills Into Public View

Soon after his first day at the Pentagon in early 2025, Army Secretary Dan Driscoll walked into his boss's office with a proposal. Driscoll, a longtime friend and aide to Vice President JD Vance, offered to organize a visit by Vance and President Trump to meet soldiers and talk about reforming the Army.

Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth raised his voice, telling Driscoll that he, Hegseth, was in charge and ordered Driscoll to stay in his lane, according to people familiar with the encounter.

Write to pierre.bertrand@wsj.com

TODAY IN CANADA

Earnings:

Nothing major scheduled

Economic Indicators (ET):

0830 CPI data for the month of March

Stocks to Watch:

(MORE TO FOLLOW) Dow Jones Newswires

April 20, 2026 06:16 ET (10:16 GMT)

Copyright (c) 2026 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: 'I have full guardianship': My son has special needs. If I buy him a condo, will that hurt his benefits?
data.description:
By Quentin Fottrell

'Another option would be for me to purchase the condo myself and have him pay me rent'

"I would prefer not to become a landlord, and I want to ensure that he can keep the property if I pass away." (Photo subject is a model.)

Dear Quentin,

I am the executor of a trust for my son with special needs.

He has been living in an apartment and has demonstrated that he is capable of living on his own with some support. I've been considering whether it might be a good idea to purchase a condo for him. There is enough money in the trust to pay cash.

If the trust purchases the condo, would he pay the trust a reasonable rent? He receives disability benefits and has very low living expenses, since he does not drive. Alternatively, instead of paying rent to the trust, could he cover the homeowners association fees and property taxes?

Another option would be for me to purchase the condo myself and have him pay me rent to cover the mortgage and expenses. However, I would prefer not to become a landlord, and I want to ensure that he can keep the property if I pass away.

I have full guardianship and I'm open to suggestions.

The Mother

Don't miss: 'My parents begged me never to put him in a home': I have taken care of my disabled brother my entire life. Am I doing enough?

You can email The Moneyist with any financial and ethical questions at qfottrell@marketwatch.com. The Moneyist regrets he cannot reply to questions individually.

Will it affect his Supplemental Security Income? Yes: If you buy him a house, it could cut his benefits by up to one-third.

Dear Mother,

Resist the urge to put property in your son's name.

But first a caveat: Supplemental Security Income (SSI) is means-tested, but Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) is not. Either way, the more control you have over your own finances - you don't know what the future will bring - the better. For that reason, I prefer putting the condo in a trust. It allows your assets to be used for your son's benefit without disqualifying him from SSI.

It may be worth sacrificing some of his benefits to provide him with more comfortable accommodation, ideally provided by the trust. The short answer to the question you did not actually ask: Will it affect his Supplemental Security Income? Yes: If you buy him a home, it could cut his benefits by up to one-third.

Providing free or reduced-cost housing is known as "in-kind support and maintenance," and that could cut his monthly benefits by as much as $331. The Social Security Administration considers free shelter to be unearned income, although he can avoid this reduction if he pays his fair share of household expenses.

"Fair share" in this context is narrowly defined and typically includes rent or mortgage value, property taxes, utilities and similar costs. Paying only some expenses - such as HOA fees or property taxes alone - may still result in a partial SSI reduction. To fully avoid triggering rules about in-kind support and maintenance, your son's rent must be at or near fair market value. Below-market rent usually triggers a reduction in SSI.

The SSA has the following guideline on this subject: "We do not count in-kind support and maintenance if you live alone and pay for your own shelter; live only with your spouse and minor children and nobody outside the household pays for your shelter; or live with other people and pay your share of the shelter expenses."

A reduction in SSI benefits may result "when you live in another person's house, apartment, or mobile home, and you pay less than your fair share of your housing costs [or] live in your own house, apartment, or mobile home, and someone else pays for all or part of your rent, mortgage, or other things like electricity and heating fuel." SSI may still be reduced unless the contribution meets the level of full share or fair market value.

A special-needs trust, however, can own the home and allow your son to live there - which is often preferable to you acting as landlord - and it can also help pay for maintenance, furniture and renovations, rather than giving cash for those things to the beneficiary. This provides housing stability without triggering SSA rules. (The SSA no longer counts food paid for by a trust as income, so that will not reduce SSI.)

Related: 'I didn't ask a man to rear-end my car': Social Security is replacing my disability benefits. Will the fund run out of money?

A legal balancing act

It's a delicate balancing act. A properly drafted special-needs trust is a legal vehicle that allows your son, as a person with a disability, to hold assets - including inheritances, property and personal-injury settlements - without exceeding the strict SSI asset limits of $2,000 for an individual or $3,000 for a couple.

Long-term planning is equally important. Assets in a special-needs or spendthrift trust will not be considered when the beneficiary applies for government benefits, such as Medicare or Medicaid, which may become a critical resource to obtain treatment services such as noncovered medical services, therapy or education.

You should put in place a secondary trustee in the event you predecease your son. A good trustee should be trustworthy, have good judgment, and be fair, objective and committed. Just as with holding power of attorney, it's not for the faint of heart. A professional - an accountant, banker or lawyer - will likely charge a fee.

The trustee is also a fiduciary, meaning they have a legal and ethical obligation to act in the best interests of the trust. Trusts are designed to manage assets, distribute income, prevent beneficiaries from getting too much money at one time, avoid probate and plan for any incapacity of the beneficiary.

A member of the Moneyist Facebook Group was in a situation very similar to yours. "My folks left a special care trust for my brother, who had cerebral palsy. I am the trustee, along with my son," she wrote. "I bought the condo, and my brother paid for the HOA fees and taxes. I kept the condo in the trust and paid the insurance.

"He also didn't drive and only had his Social Security Disability," she continued. "By keeping it in the trust, it meant that the government couldn't touch it because it didn't belong to him. Since he didn't own anything, when he passed, we didn't have to do probate."

While the arrangement worked for this reader, paying only HOA fees and taxes may not fully avoid reductions to SSI under Social Security Administration rules. Ultimately, whether housing affects your son's benefits will depend greatly on whether he receives SSI or SSDI - or both. The latter is not sensitive to housing support.

The takeaway: Don't make any decisions without consulting with a lawyer. Your caution in this process will serve you well.

Related: 'I've been kept in poverty': Do I take a $70K job at 74 and lose my Section 8 housing allowance?

More columns from Quentin Fottrell:

'We're living the simple life': I was a fisherman and my wife was a nurse. We retired with $6 million. Here's how we did it.

'It feels slimy': My friend offered to be my adviser, but didn't tell me he's paid to push financial products. Can I trust him?

My Paypal account received money from the Philippines with two phone numbers listed. I called them. Big mistake.

Check out The Moneyist's private Facebook group, where members help answer life's thorniest money issues. Post your questions, or weigh in on the latest Moneyist columns.

By emailing your questions to The Moneyist or posting your dilemmas on The Moneyist Facebook group, you agree to have them published anonymously on MarketWatch.

By submitting your story to Dow Jones & Co., the publisher of MarketWatch, you understand and agree that we may use your story, or versions of it, in all media and platforms, including via third parties.

-Quentin Fottrell

This content was created by MarketWatch, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. MarketWatch is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal. 




  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  04-20-26 0600ET


Copyright (c) 2026 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Why a $33 billion stock market buying spree is now winding down
data.description:
By Barbara Kollmeyer

The recent rally was 'a bit much,' says trading desk

Goldman Sachs trading desk warns the recent stock rally is "a bit much."

A huge wave of mechanical buying by a group of Wall Street investors scrambling to get back into the market has likely peaked, possibly a headwind for the S&P 500 going forward.

That's according to the Goldman Sachs trading desk, which sent a warning to clients on Friday after the index SPX soared to its seventh record of the year. "[Friday's] leg higher in the S&P 500 is starting to feel like a bit much," wrote John Flood, head of Americas Equities Execution Services at Goldman Sachs.

U.S. stock futures (ES00) indicated a pullback from that high on Monday, with oil (CL.1) (BRN00) climbing as Iran reversed its decision to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday.

Flood explained that CTAs, which are systematic funds that focus on trading futures contracts, have now accumulated $10 billion in bets the S&P 500 will go higher. In a big wave of buying last week, they picked up $33 billion worth of S&P 500 futures and are set to buy another $23 billion this week, he said.

But that lower buying figure for this week means the "highest velocity demand" from those CTAs is now behind the market, he said.

Flood also said flagged some issues with hedge funds that are using a ton of borrowed money to bet on markets right now. He cited the total amount they have invested, or gross leverage, at 310% or in the 92nd percentile for one year and 98th over five years. But that's as net leverage, the difference between their bullish and bearish bets - is around the 75th percentile - meaning they aren't abandoning bets the market will fall.

Nomura strategist Charlie McElligott has also spent weeks talking about a dearth of investors willing to bet on markets rising. Last week, he said the scramble for those investors to get into the market could keep pushing it up.

The Goldman trader said the stock rally can continue a bit longer, though as hedge funds transition from covering bearish bets on the stock market to buying single names that they have conviction on.

"From my client conversations it feels like there is still real belief in another leg higher in AI...most focus on energy / industrials / hardware suppliers," he said. That interest has focused on LNG players and companies like engineering, installation and maintenance services provider Legence (LGN), and tech names Applied Materials (AMAT) and Marvell Technologies (MRVL), he said.

Non-AI interest by clients is focused on the healthcare side, and some buying back of beaten-down software names. Big investors such as mutual and pension funds are "still highly concentrated in supercap tech," he said.

-Barbara Kollmeyer

This content was created by MarketWatch, which is operated by Dow Jones & Co. MarketWatch is published independently from Dow Jones Newswires and The Wall Street Journal. 




  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  04-20-26 0603ET


Copyright (c) 2026 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Solidion Technology Enters into Binding Strategic Patent Monetization Agreement with Hilco Global
data.description:
Solidion Technology Enters into Binding Strategic Patent Monetization Agreement with Hilco Global

Solidion Technology Enters into Binding Strategic Patent Monetization Agreement with Hilco Global

PR Newswire

DALLAS, April 20, 2026

Company intends to monetize its foundational patent portfolio in the global $150 billion battery market

DALLAS, April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Solidion Technology Inc. ("Solidion" or the "Company") (Nasdaq: STI), an advanced battery technology solutions provider, announced that it has entered into a binding agreement with the IP Services Practice of Hilco Global (a subsidiary of Orix Company) to monetize its foundational energy portfolio and enforce its patent rights. Hilco has analyzed the Solidion patent portfolio to identify high value assets and the patent data suggest that a significant number of global companies will likely require a license to the Solidion portfolio.  In the energy storage segment in particular, virtually all the major players in the industry have technology that overlaps with the Solidion portfolio and the same appears to be true in semiconductors, consumer electronics and aerospace.

 The value of Solidion's portfolio could exceed $750 million.

Jaymes Winters, Chief Executive Officer of Solidion Technology, stated:

"The entire energy storage ecosystem has repetitiously utilized several of Solidion's foundational patents to monetize their business models at a level rarely seen before. These are not just mom and pop startups, most of them are worldly known household names and industry leaders in not just EV battery storage, but other sectors such as semiconductors, aircraft and automotive manufacturing and cutting edge materials. The value of Solidion's portfolio could exceed $750 million."

Karl Maersch, head of the Patent Analysis & Monetization Group at Hilco IP Services, stated:

"Solidion's portfolio covers various aspects of graphene and battery technology and it has applicability across multiple industry segments and includes companies that compete with Solidion and companies in adjacent technology segments.  In our view, the portfolio shows significant indicia of value and we are excited to partner with Solidion to help the company extract revenue from its portfolio."

About Solidion Technology, Inc.

Headquartered in Dallas, Texas with pilot production facilities in Dayton, Ohio, Solidion's (NASDAQ: STI) core business includes manufacturing of  battery materials and components, as well as development and production of next-generation batteries for energy storage systems, including including UPS systems serving the artificial intelligence (AI) data center market and electric vehicles for ground, aerospace, and sea transportation. Solidion holds a portfolio of over 345 patents, covering innovations such as high-capacity, silane gas free and graphene-enabled silicon anodes, biomass-based graphite, advanced lithium-sulfur and lithium-metal technologies.

For more information, please visit www.solidiontech.com or contact Investor Relations.

About Hilco Global

Hilco Global, a subsidiary of ORIX Corporation USA, is a diversified financial services company that delivers integrated professional services and capital solutions that help clients maximize value and drive performance across the retail, commercial and industrial, real estate, manufacturing, brand and intellectual property sectors, and more. Hilco Global provides a range of customized solutions to healthy, stressed, and distressed companies to resolve complex situations and enhance long-term enterprise value. Hilco Global works to deliver the best possible result by aligning interests with clients and providing strategic advice and, in many instances, the capital required to complete the deal. Hilco Global is based in Northbrook, Illinois and has more than 810 professionals operating on four continents.

Visit www.hilcoglobal.com.

Forward-Looking Statements

This press release contains forward-looking statements within the meaning of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. Solidion Technology Inc., (NASDAQ: STI) (the "Company," "Solidion," "we," "our" or "us") desires to take advantage of the safe harbor provisions of the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995 and is including this cautionary statement in connection with this safe harbor legislation. The words "forecasts" "believe," "may," "estimate," "continue," "anticipate," "intend," "should," "plan," "could," "target," "potential," "is likely," "expect" and similar expressions, as they relate to us, are intended to identify forward-looking statements. We undertake no obligation to publicly update any forward-looking statements, whether as a result of new information, future developments or otherwise, except as may be required by law.

 

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/solidion-technology-enters-into-binding-strategic-patent-monetization-agreement-with-hilco-global-302746839.html

SOURCE Solidion Technology, Inc.

data.title: Top 5 Gundry MD Total Restore Reviews: Will It Improve Your Gut Health?
data.description:
Top 5 Gundry MD Total Restore Reviews: Will It Improve Your Gut Health?

Top 5 Gundry MD Total Restore Reviews: Will It Improve Your Gut Health?

PR Newswire

LOS ANGELES, April 20, 2026

Reviews Highlight Powerful Gut Health Support for Digestion, Energy & Overall Wellness

LOS ANGELES, April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Created by renowned heart surgeon and gut health expert Dr. Steven Gundry, Gundry MD® Total Restore® continues to generate strong positive reviews from customers seeking support for digestion, energy, and overall gut wellness. Known as "The Ultimate Gut Guardian," Total Restore is formulated with a science-backed blend of 20 pro-digestive ingredients designed to help support a healthy gut lining and promote total-body vitality.

With thousands of customers reporting smoother digestion, reduced cravings, and increased daily energy, Total Restore has become one of the most talked-about gut health supplements in the wellness industry.

Gundry MD Total Restore Reviews: What Are People Saying?*

  • "It is really saving my gut. I dont have the discomfort after eating. I can eat a bigger variety of foods. I dont think about it nearly as much." - Michelle M.

  • "I do see a difference after taking this product. My intestinal system seems much more balanced. Less gas and bloating. I take it along with a few other of Dr. Gundry products, and I have lost weight and my clothes fit me nicely." - Theresa W.

  • "One of the best supplements I have ever taken. Seems to be high quality ingredients with no side effects when it has been taken. Just GREAT stuff. . ." - Michael B.

  • "I've been taking Total for years, great product, have recommended it to friends and family members who have used it with confidence as have I, for years." - Barbara C.

  • "Great product. I have more energy and can get more done in less time. Thank you Dr. Gundry for all that you share to make such a difference in so many people's lives!!"- Connie J.

What is Gundry MD Total Restore?*✝
Gundry MD Total Restore is a comprehensive gut health and digestive support supplement created by Dr. Steven Gundry to help support a strong, healthy gut lining and promote overall wellness from the inside out. The formula features a blend of 20 science-backed ingredients designed to help reinforce intestinal barrier integrity — an important factor in digestive comfort, nutrient absorption, energy levels, and daily vitality. Rather than simply addressing occasional digestive issues, Total Restore is formulated to support the foundation of gut health itself.

The formula is designed to help counteract the effects of modern diets and lifestyle factors that may stress the digestive system. By supporting the gut lining, Gundry MD Total Restore helps promote smoother digestion, comfortable bowel movements, and improved digestive efficiency. Many users choose this supplement as part of their daily routine to help support digestion, reduce unhealthy cravings, and maintain steady energy throughout the day.

Total Restore also emphasizes the connection between gut health and overall well-being. A healthy gut can help support nutrient absorption, cognitive clarity, and balanced energy levels, which is why the product is often chosen by those searching for a gut lining support supplement, digestive wellness formula, or advanced gut health supplement. With a clean-label, lectin-free, sugar-free, soy-free, dairy-free, and artificial-sweetener-free formula, Gundry MD Total Restore offers a comprehensive approach to supporting gut health and full-body wellness.

What Are the Key Ingredients in Gundry MD Total Restore?
Gundry MD Total Restore features a powerful blend of ingredients carefully selected to support gut lining integrity, digestive comfort, and full-body wellness. Instead of relying on a single ingredient, the formula combines multiple gut-supportive compounds that work together to help reinforce the digestive system and promote overall vitality. Some of the key active ingredients include:

  • Licorice Root Extract – Traditionally used to help soothe the digestive tract and support the growth of beneficial gut bacteria, helping promote a balanced gut environment.
  • L-Glutamine – An essential amino acid known for its role in maintaining a strong intestinal lining, supporting healthy digestion, and helping manage occasional unhealthy cravings.
  • N-Acetyl-D-Glucosamine – Helps support the body's ability to build and maintain a resilient gut lining while also supporting joint and muscle comfort.
  • PepZin GI® (Zinc-L-Carnosine) – A clinically studied compound shown to support the stomach lining, promote digestive comfort, and help maintain digestive tract integrity.

Together, these ingredients help support the body's natural ability to protect and maintain the gut barrier, which plays a key role in digestion, nutrient absorption, energy levels, and overall wellness.

Gundry MD Total Restore Ingredient Breakdown
Total Restore combines:

  • Ingredients that help support a healthy gut lining
  • Nutrients designed to promote smoother digestion
  • Compounds that assist with nutrient absorption
  • Ingredients that support the gut-brain axis
  • Support for joint and muscle wellness

This 20-ingredient blend works synergistically to help reinforce intestinal barrier integrity and promote full-body wellness from the inside out.

What Are the Overall Benefits of Gundry MD Total Restore?
Gundry MD Total Restore is designed to address the root of many common wellness concerns: gut health. According to customer surveys:

  • 94% expressed having smoother digestion
  • 89% reported fewer unhealthy cravings
  • 83% felt their energy levels were higher

Key potential benefits include:

  • Supports healthy digestion and comfortable bowel movements
  • Helps reinforce gut lining integrity
  • Promotes improved nutrient absorption
  • Supports weight management and reduced cravings
  • Encourages higher daily energy levels
  • Supports cognitive clarity through the gut-brain axis
  • Helps promote joint and muscle comfort

By prioritizing gut health, Total Restore aims to help users feel more energized, focused, and balanced.

Gundry MD Total Restore Pros
Gundry MD Total Restore has gained strong positive reviews because it goes beyond basic digestive supplements and targets one of the core foundations of health: the gut lining. Rather than focusing solely on probiotics, the formula is designed to help reinforce intestinal barrier integrity, which many users believe supports improvements in digestion, energy, and overall well-being.

Many customers choose Total Restore because it takes a more comprehensive approach to gut health. By combining multiple gut-supportive compounds, it aims to address digestive comfort, cravings, mental clarity, and daily vitality in one formula.

Key advantages include:

  • Comprehensive formula with 20 gut-supportive ingredients
  • Focuses on gut lining support instead of only probiotics
  • Helps promote smoother digestion and comfortable bowel movements
  • Supports nutrient absorption and daily energy
  • May help curb unhealthy cravings and support weight goals
  • Supports the gut-brain axis for mental clarity
  • Clean-label formula (lectin-free, sugar-free, soy-free, dairy-free)
  • Includes clinically studied ingredients like PepZin GI
  • Designed by Dr. Steven Gundry, known for gut health expertise

Another key benefit is versatility; users often report improvements across multiple areas rather than just digestion, which is why Total Restore is frequently described as an all-in-one gut health and wellness supplement.

Gundry MD Total Restore Cons
While Total Restore receives many positive reviews, it's important for consumers to understand that no supplement works exactly the same for everyone. Since gut health can vary widely from person to person, results may depend on individual lifestyle, diet, and consistency of use. Some considerations include:

  • Premium formula may cost more than basic digestive or probiotic supplements
  • Requires consistent daily use for best results
  • Not designed as a quick fix — benefits may build gradually over time
  • Individuals expecting a traditional probiotic may need clarification on its different approach

Additionally, because the formula supports gut lining integrity and overall digestive function, some users may not notice immediate results and may need several weeks of consistent use before experiencing benefits.

Overall, many reviewers find the comprehensive ingredient blend and whole-body wellness approach to be worth the investment, particularly for those seeking long-term gut support rather than temporary digestive relief.

What Makes Gundry MD Total Restore Different Than Other Products?
Unlike standard probiotic supplements that focus only on introducing beneficial bacteria, Total Restore targets gut lining integrity and intestinal barrier support. Key differentiators:

  • Focuses on strengthening the gut lining
  • Contains 20 complementary digestive-support ingredients
  • Supports the gut-brain axis
  • Clean-label, lectin-free formulation

Is Total Restore a Probiotic?
Total Restore is not solely a probiotic supplement. While it supports gut health, its primary focus is to reinforce gut lining integrity and promote digestive balance, rather than simply introducing beneficial bacteria.

Total Restore vs Probiotics: What's the Difference?
While both Gundry MD Total Restore and traditional probiotics are designed to support gut health, they work in very different ways and serve different roles in a digestive wellness routine. Understanding the difference can help consumers choose the right approach for their needs.

Probiotics primarily focus on adding beneficial bacteria to the gut microbiome. These supplements are designed to help balance gut flora, support digestion, and promote overall digestive health. Probiotics can help maintain microbiome diversity, especially after lifestyle changes or dietary disruptions.

Gundry MD Total Restore, however, takes a broader and more foundational approach. Instead of focusing solely on adding bacteria, Total Restore is formulated to support the gut lining itself — the barrier that protects the body while allowing nutrients to be properly absorbed. Its blend of ingredients is designed to support intestinal barrier integrity, digestive comfort, and overall gut function.

Key Differences at a Glance

Probiotics:

  • Focus on introducing beneficial bacteria
  • Primarily target microbiome balance
  • Often centered on digestive regularity and bloating support

Gundry MD Total Restore:

  • Focuses on supporting the gut lining and digestive tract integrity
  • Uses ingredients designed to help reinforce intestinal barrier strength
  • Supports digestion, energy, cravings control, and gut-brain connection
  • Works alongside overall gut health rather than replacing probiotics

Which Is Better?
It's not necessarily a question of one being better than the other; they simply serve different purposes. Probiotics are designed to support gut bacteria, while Total Restore focuses on helping maintain the structure and health of the gut lining itself. Because gut health is multifaceted, some consumers choose to use gut lining support formulas like Total Restore as part of a more comprehensive wellness approach.

For those searching for a gut lining support supplement, digestive barrier support, or a more complete gut wellness formula beyond traditional probiotics, Gundry MD Total Restore offers a unique alternative focused on the foundation of digestive health.

Gundry MD Total Restore FAQ

  • How Do I Use Total Restore?
    • The recommended use is to take the suggested serving size daily with water, preferably before meals, as part of a consistent gut health routine. Consistency is key to experiencing optimal results.
  • Who Should Use Total Restore?
    • Total Restore may be beneficial for adults who:
      • Experience digestive discomfort
      • Struggle with unhealthy food cravings
      • Feel low energy or brain fog
      • Want to support gut lining health
      • Are focused on long-term gut wellness
  • When Can I Expect Results?
    • Results vary depending on the individual. Some users report improvements in digestion and energy within a few weeks, while others may notice gradual improvements over consistent use. Daily use is recommended for best results.
  • Where Can I Purchase Total Restore?
    • Gundry MD Total Restore can be purchased through the official Gundry MD website and authorized retailers. Buying directly ensures authenticity, access to customer support, and eligibility for guarantees.
  • How Can I Ensure I'm Getting Authentic Gundry MD Products?
    • To guarantee authenticity:
      • Purchase directly from the official Gundry MD website
      • Verify authorized sellers
      • Avoid unverified third-party marketplaces
      • Buying from trusted sources ensures product quality and access to customer guarantees.

About Gundry MD
Founded in 2015, Gundry MD is dedicated to providing cutting-edge solutions to its users through science-backed ingredients that support metabolism, sustain energy, promote smooth, easy digestion, and support a youthful-feeling mind and body. These amazing results all begin with feeding your body powerful health-boosting nutrients like polyphenols. Based on his many years of nutrition research, Dr. Gundry helps create every Gundry MD product. Best-selling Gundry MD products include Bio Complete 3, MCT Wellness, Total Restore, and Polyphenol-Rich Olive Oil. All Gundry MD products come with a 90-day purchase price guarantee (minus shipping) if you are not satisfied. For more information, visit www.gundrymd.com or @gundrymd on Instagram and Facebook.

About Dr. Gundry
Founder of Gundry MD, Dr. Steven Gundry was one of the world's top cardiothoracic surgeons before leaving his practice to pursue restorative medicine. Today, he is the founder and medical director of The International Heart and Lung Institute and The Centers for Restorative Medicine in Palm Springs and Montecito, California, where he has spent the past 25 years helping people restore their health by optimizing nutrition and lifestyle. Steven Gundry, MD, is also the host of the top-ranked health podcast, The Dr. Gundry Podcast, and the author of four New York Times best-selling books, including The Plant Paradox™, which details his famous lectin-free diet. For more information, visit drgundry.com, the Dr. Gundry YouTube channel, Dr Gundry en Español, and follow @drstevengundry on Instagram and TikTok.

✝ These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

*Individual results will vary.

Media Contact -
Gundrymd@inspirethenow.com

data.title: Substance Wines Unveils 2025 ‘Ri’ Riesling, a Vibrant New Expression of Washington Wine
data.description:
Substance Wines Unveils 2025 ‘Ri’ Riesling, a Vibrant New Expression of Washington Wine

Substance Wines, the Washington-based brand from O’Neill Vintners & Distillers, a B Corp Certified, family owned and operated company, is proud to announce the launch of its 2025 'Ri' Riesling (SRP $14). Crafted by Winemaker Brennon Leighton, this new single-vineyard offering reinforces the brand’s commitment to high-quality low-intervention winemaking while highlighting the distinct terroir of Washington State.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260420515534/en/

Substance ‘Ri’ Riesling

Sourced exclusively from the Evergreen Vineyard in the Ancient Lakes of Columbia Valley AVA, this AVA is renowned for producing world-class white wines from its unique cool-climate slopes.

"Substance ‘Ri’ Riesling delivers exactly what today’s wine drinker is looking for: freshness, complexity, and incredible value,” says Founder & CEO, Jeff O’Neill. The 'Ri' Riesling brings a vibrant and complex energy to the Substance portfolio, launching strategically to meet a growing consumer trend toward refreshing white wines and the increasing popularity of the $9-13 Washington State Riesling segment. Consistent with a growing consumer demand for lighter, more refreshing varietals, the 2025 ‘Ri’ Riesling features a lower alcohol content of 11.5% ABV.

Leighton, Washington’s undisputed master of Riesling, brings over two decades of winemaking expertise to this project, emphasizing purity, nuance, and the singular expression of the vineyard. Leighton meticulously selects sustainably grown grapes and uses native yeast fermentation, lees aging, and a minimal amount of sulfur dioxide to achieve a true expression of the site and vintage.

The 2025 Substance ‘Ri’ Riesling is available nationally.

About O'Neill Vintners & Distillers

O'Neill Vintners & Distillers is a Certified B Corporation, is a family-owned, vertically integrated wine and spirits company dedicated to crafting exceptional wines and spirits while setting a new standard for sustainability in the industry. Founded in 2004 by visionary Jeff O’Neill, the company has emerged as a true leader in environmental stewardship-proving that scale and sustainability can go hand in hand. O'Neill has earned some of the highest honors in the field, including B Corp Certification, Regenerative Organic Certified® status, and the prestigious Green Medal Leader Award from the California Wine Institute. These accolades reflect not only a deep commitment to regenerative farming and climate-smart practices, but also a bold vision for the future of wine and spirits. With winery estates in Sonoma and Paso Robles and a winery facility in Parlier, O’Neill’s diverse portfolio includes Ram’s Gate Winery, Robert Hall Winery, Line 39, Wines of Substance, FitVine Wine, Harken Chardonnay, Rabble Wine Company, Charles Woodson’s Intercept, No. 209 Gin, and BrandyLab. To learn more, visit www.ONeillWine.com

Media Contact: Michelle Keene
Calhoun & Company Communications
415.346.2929 | michelle@calhounwine.com

data.title: 2026 Global Sources Best of Innovation Awards Unveiled! 58 Practical Products Hold the Keys to Trade Breakthroughs
data.description:
2026 Global Sources Best of Innovation Awards Unveiled! 58 Practical Products Hold the Keys to Trade Breakthroughs

2026 Global Sources Best of Innovation Awards Unveiled! 58 Practical Products Hold the Keys to Trade Breakthroughs

PR Newswire

HONG KONG, April 20, 2026

HONG KONG, April 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- In April 2026, the Global Sources Best of Innovation Awards, organised by Global Sources, were announced live at the Global Sources Hong Kong Show. The Awards leverage the core platform of the exhibition to incentivise corporate innovation and build trade bridges. Their goal is to set industry benchmarks and drive enterprises to enhance product value through innovation upgrades. This year's edition continues its partnership with the European Product Design Award (EPDA)™, adding a "Best Product Design Award" to specifically recognise outstanding integration of aesthetic design and innovative functionality.

Diverse Innovation Across Seven Categories, Four Criteria Rooted in Trade Realities
This year's Best of Innovation Awards focus on seven core categories: Consumer Electronics, Gaming & eSports, Mobile Electronics, Batteries & Energy, Smart Home, Security & Home Appliances, and Quality Living. The evaluation system is built on four criteria highly relevant to the trade environment: Practicality, Cost-Effectiveness, Technological Maturity, and Market Demand Fit.

The judging panel comprises experts from industry associations, technology media and other fields. Of over 380 submitted products, 103 were shortlisted, and ultimately 58 products stood out to win honours. This year's winning products demonstrate multi-dimensional breakthroughs in trade innovation, with notable strengths in AI-hardware integration, functional adaptation for niche scenarios, and compliance-driven quality upgrades. These directions closely align with the core needs of current global trade: enhancing product premiums, mitigating market risks and meeting diverse consumer demands.

Dual Awards Lead Innovation; Selection Mechanism Highlights Industry Value
This year's Awards feature two parallel tracks: the "Innovation Award" and the "Best Product Design Award". The Innovation Award serves as the core pillar, focusing on commercial viability. Within this category, the jury also specially selected one product to receive the "AI Innovation Award", recognising its outstanding integration of AI technology. The "Best Product Design Award" serves as a vital complement, introducing international design standards and evaluating products across dimensions such as aesthetics, user experience and sustainability. Together, these awards provide clear guidance for companies seeking to uncover differentiated competitive advantages and achieve a leap in trade value.

John Kao, Vice President of Global Sources Hong Kong & Overseas Shows, stated: "The mission of the Best of Innovation Awards is not only to recognise outstanding achievements but also, through clear selection criteria, to help companies identify key points for differentiated competition. Products that balance technological applicability, design quality and compliance are increasingly favoured — and this represents the core competitiveness of the future global consumer electronics trade."

Laurent Devos, CEO of the European Product Design Award (EPDA), added: "In today's global trade environment, product design is not just about looking good. Great design quickly attracts consumers, builds differentiated recognition in commoditised markets, effectively lowers marketing costs, and directly drives product premiums and user loyalty through an enhanced user experience."

Industry Takeaway: Creating Great Products Starts with Innovation
The results of this year's Best of Innovation Awards further confirm the industry consensus that "creating great products starts with innovation".

The Global Sources Best of Innovation Awards serve as an important platform for bringing this philosophy to life. Winning companies not only gain authoritative industry recognition but also leverage the exhibition to achieve efficient alignment from innovation through to market promotion. The Awards will continue to act as a bridge, providing industry trend insights and resource matching, helping companies sustain growth momentum in global markets, and promoting the evolution and advancement of the industrial ecosystem.

 

About Global Sources
Based in Hong Kong, Global Sources is a globally recognized B2B sourcing platform. With 55 years of dedicated service in facilitating international trade, it has earned the trust and recognition of the global business community through its proven track record of connecting quality buyers worldwide with verified top-tier Asian manufacturers. As a sourcing hub for market-ready innovative consumer products, Global Sources provides efficient and convenient trade services to over 14 million registered buyers and users worldwide.

SOURCE Global Sources
